meaning: v.骇人听闻的,可怕的adj.丑恶的
examples: They drown out Orpheus' music with the hideous roar of their howlings and their screamings and they tear him limb from limb.
Their new colour scheme is hideous!
As a teen, he identified with men in horror films who turned into hideous monsters.
Crichton graphically portrays all the hideous things that can go wrong with genetic research.
